name: Neon Portfolio
author: Community
description: Cyberpunk-inspired portfolio with neon accents and dark backgrounds
prompt: A cyberpunk-themed portfolio website with neon green and purple accent colors on a dark background. Include a glitch-effect hero section, project gallery with hover glow effects, skills section with animated progress bars, and a contact form. Use monospace fonts and subtle scanline effects.

name: Minimal Agency
author: Community
description: Clean agency site with lots of whitespace and elegant typography
prompt: A minimal agency website with a clean white design, elegant serif typography, and subtle animations. Include a hero with large text, services grid, case studies with large images, team section, and contact form. Use black and white with one gold accent color.

name: Gradient SaaS
author: Community
description: Bold SaaS landing page with gradient backgrounds and glassmorphism
prompt: A SaaS landing page with bold gradient backgrounds (purple to blue), glassmorphism cards, and smooth animations. Include a hero with product mockup placeholder, features with floating cards, pricing tiers, testimonials carousel, and CTA section. Modern and premium feel.

name: Retro Blog
author: Community
description: Vintage-inspired blog with warm tones and newspaper-style layout
prompt: A retro-styled blog with warm cream backgrounds, serif typography reminiscent of old newspapers, and vintage decorative elements. Include a masthead header, featured article with large image, article grid with dates and categories, sidebar with about and recent posts, and a simple footer.

name: Eco Store
author: Community
description: Nature-themed e-commerce page with earthy colors
prompt: An eco-friendly store landing page with earthy green and brown tones, organic shapes, and nature-inspired design. Include a hero with mission statement, featured products grid with image placeholders and prices, sustainability section with stats, testimonials, and newsletter signup. Warm and inviting.

name: Developer Hub
author: Community
description: Technical documentation-style site with code-themed design
prompt: A developer-focused landing page with a dark terminal-inspired design, monospace fonts, and syntax-highlighting-colored accents. Include a hero with typing animation effect, feature cards styled like code blocks, API documentation preview section, pricing for API tiers, and a footer with links. Use green and blue accents on dark backgrounds.
